title: Maskarad
writer: Sergey Gerasimov, Vyacheslav Gordanov, Mikhail Lermontov
actors: Nikolai Mordvinov, Tamara Makarova, Mikhail Sadovsky
plot: The story begins when beautiful Nina (Makarova) loses a bracelet during a masked ball. Another woman finds it and without revealing who she is, gives it to an ardent cavalry officer admirer at the ball. This officer had earlier sp...
